name: autonomi-domain-knowledge
description: Deep industry domain knowledge for LynZ — food science, regulatory compliance, supply chain, product development, and financial systems expertise

skills.name: F&B Product Formulation

skills.description: Commodity procurement, cold chain logistics, demand planning, supplier qualification, inventory optimization, co-manufacturing

skills.name: F&B Product Development
skills.description: Stage-gate NPD, sensory evaluation, scale-up, nutritional labeling, claims substantiation, packaging engineering

skills.name: QuickBooks Online Integration
skills.description: Chart of accounts for F&B, COGS tracking, inventory valuation, batch costing, tax compliance, QBO API patterns

skills.name: Bill.com AP/AR Automation
skills.description: Vendor payment workflows, 3-way matching, approval routing, ACH/wire settlement, F&B payment terms, rebate tracking

skills.name: Microsoft 365 Integration
